creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
Currently, vegastrike does not compile with the latest PNG version so instead of trying to patch around it, I instead grabbed the latest code and was able to compile it without issue.  None of the patches applied but at the same time, for my 9.x amd64 system, none were needed to function correctly.  That may not be the case for other systems but I have not tested on them.  Also, this does not compile for me at present so this diff unbreaks things.

How-To-Repeat: 	Does not compile on 9.x amd64 system since latest png update.  Does compile after applied diff.
